title: parthenice mollis var. mollis
intro: Parthenice mollis var. mollis, also known as the sweet cicely, is a plant in the carrot family (Apiaceae) that is native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant's medicinal properties include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat digestive issues and soothe skin irritations. The health benefits of sweet cicely include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce bloating, and lower blood pressure, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health issues. Sweet cicely can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
